scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix projects/valorant-nft && npm install --prefix projects/beauty-studio && npm install --prefix projects/gabriel-contassot && npm install --prefix projects/zajno-digital-studio && npm install --prefix projects/absent-agency && npm install --prefix projects/jirani && npm install --prefix projects/velocity
scripts.build:demos: mkdir -p public/demos && npm run build:valorant-nft && npm run build:beauty-studio && npm run build:gabriel-contassot && npm run build:zajno-digital-studio && npm run build:absent-agency && npm run build:jirani && npm run build:velocity
scripts.build:valorant-nft: cd projects/valorant-nft && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/valorant-nft && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/valorant-nft
scripts.build:beauty-studio: cd projects/beauty-studio && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/beauty-studio && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/beauty-studio
scripts.build:gabriel-contassot: cd projects/gabriel-contassot && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/gabriel-contassot && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/gabriel-contassot
scripts.build:zajno-digital-studio: cd projects/zajno-digital-studio && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/zajno-digital-studio && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/zajno-digital-studio
scripts.build:absent-agency: cd projects/absent-agency && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/absent-agency && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/absent-agency
scripts.build:jirani: cd projects/jirani && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/jirani && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/jirani
scripts.build:velocity: cd projects/velocity && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/demos/velocity && cp -r dist ../../public/demos/velocity
